title: Marxx's_Recipes_Plus
description: Marxx’s Recipes Plus is a vanilla-friendly mod that adds realistic and balanced crafting recipes for hard-to-obtain Minecraft items, introduces Copper gear, and expands Netherite progression with four new hybrid tiers, each with unique abilities.
body:
**🔹 Vanilla-Friendly by Design**

Marxx’s Recipes Plus is a survival-focused, vanilla-friendly mod that expands Minecraft without changing how the game feels.

The goal of this mod is simple:

Give Minecraft logical, immersive and balanced crafting recipes for items that normally have no real way to be crafted, while respecting vanilla progression.

No shortcuts.
No overpowered machines.
No modded-style complexity.

Everything fits naturally into survival gameplay.

**🟠 Copper Tools & Armor**

Minecraft has Copper… but no real use for it.

This mod adds:

Copper tools

Copper armor

Designed as an early-game tier:

Better than stone

Weaker than iron

Fully balanced for survival

Copper finally has a purpose without replacing iron.

**🛠️ New Crafting Recipes (Vanilla Items)**

This mod adds realistic and survival-friendly recipes for many vanilla items that normally:

Have no crafting recipe

Are locked behind RNG

Or are too tedious to obtain

All recipes are balanced and progression-aware.

Craftable Items Include:

Elytra (using a custom Elytra Wing item)

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aed6bd7f9024991a2722605a449b1d774bd0343.png)

Chainmail Armor (full set)

It's the same as any normal vanilla armor recipe but with iron chains

**Trident Rework**

The Trident is now craftable using custom components:

Trident Stick

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/710338b76d4b25f4f266962fcb6e27af26fb29c4.png)

Trident Heart

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2057a17a249fe827d16ab99db816b2dd1d77d22d.png)

Trident Teeth

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01bdcea5eb33b5fd72525d12d9750beca2582ff3.png)

This keeps it rare, valuable, and lore-friendly.

**⚙️ Smithing Upgrade Templates**

Craftable Smithing Upgrade Templates

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69496aa40a1c8288fd2190a1eb833c4cfbbd294a.png)

Balanced recipes

No exploration removal, just fair alternatives

**🔥 Expanded Netherite Progression (4 New Tiers)**

Marxx’s Recipes Plus introduces four new Netherite hybrid tiers, each with armor + tools + unique abilities.

These tiers do not replace vanilla Netherite — they expand progression after it.

**🟣 Netherite + Iron**

Armor with unique passive abilities

Sword and Pickaxe with special effects

Focused on durability and reliability

**🟡 Netherite + Gold**

Utility-focused abilities

Sword and Pickaxe with unique mechanics

Designed around drops, experience and versatility

**🟢 Netherite + Emerald**

Quantity-focused tier

Chance-based bonus drops

Never stronger than Diamond, even with Fortune

**🔵 Netherite + Diamond**

Advanced mechanics

Auto-smelt mining behavior

Smart Fortune simulation

Powerful but carefully balanced

End-game quality-of-life tier

Each tier:

Has full armor sets

Includes Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe

Features custom abilities

Is balanced to never feel unfair or mandatory

**🏆 Advancements**

Custom advancements for progression

Rewards players for crafting and completing tiers

Fully integrated with survival gameplay

**🌍 Language Support**

Available languages:

English (US)

Spanish (Spain)

Spanish (Mexico)

Spanish (Argentina)

Spanish (Colombia)

**⚖️ Balance Philosophy**

No “OP modded tools”

No progression skipping

Everything feels like it could have been vanilla

This mod is designed for players who love Minecraft as it is, but always wished it had more logical recipes and deeper progression.

**⚙️ Recommendation:**
It is recommended to use the **[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)** mod with this mod to see all the recipes within the game, although they can be seen in the photos above.

**🔧 Supported Versions**

Forge 1.20.1

NeoForge 1.21.1

NeoForge 1.21.4

NeoForge 1.21.8

Fabric 1.21.8
